action.reasoning: Observation: iter 6 training failed due to `ReduceLROnPlateau(verbose=True)` removal in recent PyTorch. Previous baseline exprate=0.0 (iter 5) with 5-epoch ResNet-50 full stride 32 model. Analysis: need to fix the scheduler verbose arg and re-run training with improved architecture (stride 16). Must also fix model encode method, ensure predict.py uses correct shape, and train longer with better schedule. Decision: rewrite all three files with fixes: remove verbose, add model.encode(), proper memory transpose, better LR schedule (warmup+cosine), mixed precision, 30 epochs, beam width 5. Submit eval after training to measure improvement.
